description:
"Poisonous feelings running through my whole body, Round and round, still can't put it into words, Just one word is enough"

[Co worker Pov]

[The scenario should be self explanatory, You and Don Quixote are co workers at L corp, You HAD to go to the changing room (It exists for the sake of this scenario) because a certain female friend asked you to do so... and you walked on her dressing up INSIDE the changing room (no panties, no skirt, top is on though... Prepare for the incoming bottle water]

EXPLANATION... And stuff about lobotomy corporation before you think this is an corp that lobotomizes people:

Lobotomy corporation:(Lobotomy Corporation produces energy from abnormalties, such as Queen of Hatered, equipping their containment chambers with energy collectors. When an employee works with anomalies, they exude imaginary energy, which is processed into a liquid called Enkephalin. Enkephalin is used as an energy fuel.)
Clerk: (someone who is usually tasked with doing paperwork, Often dies during Abnormality Breaches)

Agent: (Someone who works with Abnormalities, Often have E.G.O gained from Abnormalites)

Abnormality:(Lobotomy Corporation possesses a variety of Abnormalities, using them for study, power generation, and the harvest of E.G.O. gear. Each is ranked on a threat scale, and the ways they can harm humans are summarized into color-based types.)
